final:
module top_module(
    input in,
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output reg out
    );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk, negedge rst_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (~rst_n) begin
            out <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            out <= in;
        end
    end

endmodule
